atlas v0.5
Back To Use Cases

Use Case

Gaming / Hardware / Future-Tech Launch

适合游戏、硬件、未来技术、世界观强的品牌发布页。舞台感和世界观要先成立。

Primary Family

Neon Techno-Futurist Interface

Structures

Immersive Stage

Why This Fit Works

从任务反推视觉和结构

Content Shape

Hero stage, dramatic contrast, worldbuilding visuals, sparse intro copy.

User Goal

让用户先进入一个场景，再理解产品或叙事的未来感设定。

Why

世界观和能量感优先，但不能牺牲基本层级。

Avoid

  • 只剩发光和霓虹
  • 世界观成立但导航崩掉
  • 在不适合的内容上硬套暗黑未来感

Recommended Families

这个场景最适合借哪几条家族

Web Family

Neon Techno-Futurist Interface

Dark-ground, neon-accent, worldbuilding-first pages that feel closer to game, hardware, or future-tech launch surfaces than to standard product pages.

Historical Roots

Cyberpunk / Techno-Futurism

Best For

gaminghardware launchesimmersive tech brands
Open family
Web Family

Stage-Driven Showcase

A hero or first fold behaves like a stage. One image, scene, or world carries the page before the rest of the content unfolds.

Historical Roots

Art Deco / Streamlined LuxuryCyberpunk / Techno-Futurism

Best For

campaignsflagship launchesfilm and entertainment
Open family

Prompt Packet

可以直接复制给 agent 的场景提示

Prompt Packet

Gaming / Hardware / Future-Tech Launch

Content type: Gaming / Hardware / Future-Tech Launch IA layer: Immersive Stage Visual family: Neon Techno-Futurist Interface + Stage-Driven Showcase Reference packet: Neon Techno-Futurist Interface / Stage-Driven Showcase Mood: 适合游戏、硬件、未来技术、世界观强的品牌发布页。舞台感和世界观要先成立。 Required traits: 让用户先进入一个场景，再理解产品或叙事的未来感设定。 Avoid: 只剩发光和霓虹 / 世界观成立但导航崩掉 / 在不适合的内容上硬套暗黑未来感

Design Zondev is a design-style atlas: movement → family → structure → prompt packet.

Updated 2026-03-30 · design.zondev.top
